title: Ambientbasic
summary: Builds the ambient bundle, dilation action, straight metric data, the cone inclusion at rho = 0, and the straight normal-form interface.

mathematicalContent.heading: Mathematical role
mathematicalContent.body: Builds the ambient bundle, dilation action, straight metric data, the cone inclusion at rho = 0, and the straight normal-form interface.

mathematicalContent.heading: How to read the translation
mathematicalContent.body: The correspondence below follows Ambient/Ambientbasic.lean declaration by declaration. A definition is translated by its defining expression, a theorem by its quantified proposition, and a structure, class, or inductive type by the mathematical data encoded in its fields or constructors. The original Lean signature remains visible beside every translation.

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: The ambient extension of the ray bundle by one real ρ-coordinate. In explicit terms, its defining expression is Conf.Metric Bundle × the real numbers.
A concrete ambient bundle using actual pointwise metrics instead of rays. In explicit terms, its defining expression is Conf.Point Metric Bundle × the real numbers.
Projection from the ambient bundle to the base manifold. In explicit terms, its defining expression is | u, maps to u.1.
Projection from the concrete ambient bundle to the base manifold. In explicit terms, its defining expression is | u, maps to u.1.
The ρ-coordinate on the ambient bundle. In explicit terms, its defining expression is |, ρ maps to ρ.
The ρ-coordinate on the concrete ambient bundle. In explicit terms, its defining expression is |, ρ maps to ρ.
Inclusion of the ray bundle as the hypersurface {ρ = 0}. In explicit terms, its defining expression is the function sending u to u, 0.
Inclusion of the concrete metric bundle as the hypersurface {ρ = 0}. In explicit terms, its defining expression is the function sending u to u, 0.
Ambient dilation on the ray bundle side: act on the ray factor, keep ρ fixed. In explicit terms, for a of type pos real, its defining expression is | u, ρ maps to Conf.dilate Bundle a u, ρ.

Ambient dilation on the concrete metric side: act on the metric factor, keep ρ fixed. In explicit terms, for a of type pos real, its defining expression is | u, ρ maps to Conf.dilate Point Metric Bundle a u, ρ.
Projection from concrete ambient metrics to ambient rays. In explicit terms, its defining expression is | u, ρ maps to Conf.point To Fiber Bundle u, ρ.

Given a scale s, the existing trivialization of the ray bundle extends to the ambient bundle by adjoining the ρ-coordinate. We use the target ((PosReal × M) × ℝ) to avoid ambiguity in product associativity. In explicit terms, for s of type conf.scale, its defining expression is to Fun : equals the function sending U to Conf.trivialization s U.1.1, Conf.trivialization s U.1.2, U.2 inv Fun : equals the function sending V to Conf.trivialization s.symm V.1, V.2 left inv : equals by intro U cases U simp right inv : equals by intro V cases V simp.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \operatorname{ambientTrivialization}(s)=\operatorname{toFun} = U \longmapsto (((\operatorname{Conf}.\operatorname{trivialization} s 1_{\mathrm{U}}).1, (\operatorname{Conf}.\operatorname{trivialization} s 1_{\mathrm{U}}).2), 2_{\mathrm{U}}) \operatorname{invFun} = V \longmapsto ((\operatorname{Conf}.\operatorname{trivialization} s).\operatorname{symm} 1_{\mathrm{V}}, 2_{\mathrm{V}}) \operatorname{left\_inv} = \operatorname{by} \operatorname{intro} U \operatorname{cases} U \operatorname{simp} \operatorname{right\_inv} = \operatorname{by} \operatorname{intro} V \operatorname{cases} V \operatorname{simp}
correspondence.leanType: noncomputable def ambientTrivialization (s : Conf.Scale) : Conf.AmbientBundle ≃ ((PosReal × M) × ℝ)

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: A 1-parameter family of actual metrics on M, anchored at a chosen base scale. Important: gRho ρ is a family of concrete metric fields, not a family of scales. Only at ρ = 0 do we require compatibility with the initial conformal structure. Its mathematical data are: base Scale: Conf.Scale; g Rho: the real numbers maps to Conf.Metric Field; compat0: for every x : M, Conf.to Fiber g Rho 0 x equals base Scale.metric x.
The concrete metric field at ρ = 0. In explicit terms, for a of type conf.straight metric data, its defining expression is A.g Rho 0.
The ray section underlying the base scale. In explicit terms, for a of type conf.straight metric data, its defining expression is A.base Scale.metric.
correspondence.leanType: def baseRaySection (A : Conf.StraightMetricData) : ∀ x : M, Conf.MetricFiber x

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: A formal straight-form ambient metric. At the current abstraction level, this is just a wrapper around the data needed to write the expression 2ρ dt² + 2t dt dρ + t² gρ after choosing a scale trivialization. Its mathematical data are: data: Conf.Straight Metric Data.
The underlying base scale. In explicit terms, for g of type conf.straight form, its defining expression is G.data.base Scale.
The underlying 1-parameter family of concrete metrics. In explicit terms, for g of type conf.straight form, its defining expression is G.data.g Rho.
Build a straight form directly from its data. In explicit terms, for a of type conf.straight metric data, its defining expression is ⟨A⟩.

references.locator: Chapters 2–3, ambient space and normal form
references.note: Geometric source for the ambient bundle, homogeneity, normal form, and commutator calculations.

limitations: Verified means that Lean checks the propositions encoded in this file and their imported assumptions. It does not assert that the present formal statement exhausts every analytic hypothesis or convention in the cited literature.
